# Venym Search

> Enterprise-grade web scraping, real-time search, and AI-powered research APIs by Venym Labs.

## Products

### SwiftSearch
Real-time web search across 8 engines in parallel. Sub-second results with intelligent merging.
- Endpoint: POST /api/v1/swiftsearch
- Auth: Bearer token (API key)

### ScrapeForge
Bypass any anti-bot protection. JavaScript rendering, CAPTCHA handling, contact extraction.
- Endpoint: POST /api/v1/scrapeforge
- Auth: Bearer token (API key)

### DeepDive
Multi-source AI research. Search, scrape top results, and synthesize findings in one call.
- Endpoint: POST /api/v1/deepdive
- Auth: Bearer token (API key)

## Quick Start
1. Sign up at https://search.venym.io/signup
2. Get your API key from the dashboard
3. Make your first request:
   curl -X POST https://search.venym.io/api/v1/swiftsearch \
     -H "Authorization: Bearer VENYM_SEARCH_API_KEY" \
     -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
     -d '{"query": "your search query"}'

## Docs
- Quickstart: https://search.venym.io/docs/quickstart
- API Reference: https://search.venym.io/docs/api-reference/swiftsearch
- Pricing: https://search.venym.io/pricing
